title: New Year Celebration
description: Ring in the new year with Emersyn and friends! Watch fireworks on TV, make resolutions, and enjoy a special midnight countdown party with Frooti and popcorn chicken.

activities.name: Countdown Party
activities.description: Host a pajama party with Ava and Mia, watch fireworks from the garden

activities.name: Resolution Reel
activities.description: Record a fun New Year resolution video to share with friends

special_items.name: Sparkly 2025 Tiara
special_items.description: A glittery tiara with the new year numbers

title: Makar Sankranti Kite Festival
description: The sky fills with colorful kites! Emersyn joins the rooftop kite-flying fun with her family. Enjoy til-gul sweets and watch kites dance in the wind.

activities.name: Kite Flying Competition
activities.description: Fly your decorated kite from the garden and try to stay airborne longest

activities.name: Til-Gul Exchange
activities.description: Share sweet sesame treats with Ava, Mia, and Leo saying 'Til-gul ghya, god god bola'

special_items.name: Rainbow Patang Kite
special_items.description: A beautiful handcrafted kite with rainbow colors

title: Republic Day Parade
description: Celebrate India's Republic Day with pride! Emersyn watches the parade on TV, dresses in tricolor, and performs a patriotic dance at school.

activities.description: Learn and perform a patriotic dance routine at school with Teacher

activities.name: Flag Badge Making
activities.description: Create tricolor badges and ribbons with Mia's artistic help

title: Friendship Valentine's Day
description: Spread love and friendship! Emersyn makes cute valentine cards for her besties Ava and Mia, and shares heart-shaped candies with everyone.

activities.name: Friendship Reel

activities.name: Carnival Game Champion

description: The most colorful day of the year! Emersyn plays with gulal, throws water balloons with Ava, and enjoys delicious gujiya sweets and refreshing thandai.

title: Spring Flower Festival
description: The garden blooms with beautiful flowers! Emersyn plants seeds, makes flower crowns, and enjoys a lovely picnic in the park with her friends and pets.

title: International Women's Day
